title: Create: Buildstone Toolkit
description: A Create and Buildstone Toolkit addon aiming to raise the aesthetic ceiling of both mods!
body:
## DESCRIPTION WIP
This mod is an addon to both Buildstone Toolkit (my other mod) and Create!

It has the same mission as the former: small additions with huge impact on what you can achieve in your builds!

It currently only adds one block: the Assembly Proxy, which allows you to wirelessly extend contraption assembly (check the the gallery to see it in action!)

I am very open to suggestions, so join the discord and let me know what other features you imagine would fit in the mod!
